title: Your mood has dipped this week
message: It looks like your mood has been a bit lower over the past week compared to the week before. That happens, and it's worth noticing. A short walk, a call with someone you trust, or writing down how you're feeling can sometimes help.

title: Check in on today's wellness plan
message: Today's wellness plan includes a mental wellbeing tip picked for your stage of pregnancy -- it might be worth a look.

title: Your mood has been improving
message: Your mood has trended upward over the past week compared to the week before -- that's genuinely good to see. Keep doing whatever's been helping.

title: Your mood has been steady
message: Your mood has stayed fairly consistent over the past two weeks. Steady is good -- keep checking in daily so we can keep this picture accurate.

title: It's been a few days since your last check-in
message: You haven't logged your mood in a few days. A quick daily check-in takes seconds and helps us notice patterns that are actually useful to you.

title: You haven't taken a wellbeing screening yet
message: A short stress or mood screening (PSS-10, EPDS, or GAD-7) adds useful context alongside your daily mood logs -- it only takes a few minutes.

title: It's been a while since your last screening
message: It's been a few weeks since your last wellbeing screening. Taking another can help track how things are trending, especially as your pregnancy progresses.

title: Your last screening showed a higher score
message: Your most recent wellbeing screening came back in the higher range. This isn't a diagnosis, but it's worth mentioning to your doctor at your next visit, or sooner if you'd like to talk to someone now.

title: The community forum is here too
message: Sometimes it helps to hear from other mothers going through something similar.

title: Your last screening showed a moderate score
message: Your most recent screening was in the moderate range. Keeping up your daily check-ins and today's wellness plan can help -- and it's always fine to mention how you're feeling at your next visit.

title: Your recent screenings have been trending higher
message: Your last two wellbeing screenings show an upward trend. A pattern across more than one test is worth raising with your doctor -- you don't need to wait for your next scheduled visit if you'd rather talk sooner.

title: You've been checking in consistently
message: You've logged your mood regularly over the past month -- that consistency makes the trends here much more meaningful. Keep it up.

title: Keep checking in
message: Once you've logged a few more mood entries or taken a wellbeing screening, we'll be able to show you more useful patterns here.
